zh.Whittingham, East Lothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig於1415年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯時，他的父親William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig20歲，母親Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock18歲。他於大約1435年與Margaret Carlyle在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1464年在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig于1415年出生在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯时，他的父亲William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig20岁，母亲Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock18岁。他于大约1435年与Margaret Carlyle在英国苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1464年在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig was born in 1415, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig, was 20 and his mother, Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock, was 18. He married Margaret Carlyle about 1435, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1464, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig est né en 1415, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Carlyle environ 1435, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1464, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig 1415 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig 20 und seine Mutter Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock 18. Er hat um 1435 in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Carlyle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1464 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig è nato il nel 1415 nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Carlyle circa 1435, nel Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1464, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrigが1415年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズで生まれた時，父William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrigは20歳，母Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverockは18歳であった。約1435年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでMargaret Carlyleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1464年に故郷で49歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig(이)가 1415년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1435년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 Margaret Carlyle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1464년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig nasceu em 1415, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Carlyle aproximadamente 1435, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1464, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig родился в 1415 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Carlyle около 1435 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1464 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig nació en 1415, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, William Douglas 2nd of Drumlanrig, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Jane Maxwell of Caerlaverock, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Carlyle aproximadamente 1435, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1464, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
